calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
David Hill, Esq., for Thomas Blean, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court and counsel discuss the instant petition specifically the Bank of America and USAA accounts. After additional discussion, the court advises that it intends to grant the instant petition but only confirming the Bank of America account as an asset of the trust. No objection to the preceding is presented and the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-25-2025 Continued To Apr-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
